title: APL/Winter Showdown/Season 2

{{DISPLAYTITLE:APL Winter Showdown Season 2}} {{Infobox league |game=BGMI |liquipediatier=3 |name=APL Winter Showdown Season 2 |tickername=APL Winter Showdown S2 |shortname=Season 2 |image=APL Winter Showdown Season 2 allmode.png |icon=APL Winter Showdown Season 2 allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=24 |series=APL Winter Showdown |organizer=APL Esports |organizer2= |organizer2-link= |sponsor= |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=1200000 |country=India |sdate=2023-12-21 |edate=2023-12-27 |web= |facebook= |discord= |youtube=@APLESPORTS |loco= |instagram=aplesports_org }} '''APL Winter Showdown''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament hosted by APL Esports. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard |position=Production talent |b1=DSTRXN|b1flag=in|b1name=Nitish Singh Basera |b2=TR1GN0|b2flag=in|b2name=Harsh Saxena }} {{broadcasterCard |b1=Insane Arena |b2=Gamezotech |b3=Spero }} ===Format=== * '''Semi Finals:''''' December 21st - 24th, 2023 ** 24 teams. ** 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals:''''' December 25th - 27th, 2023 ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=INR |{{Slot |localprize=475000 |{{Opponent|Team Omega}} }} |{{Slot |localprize=300000 |{{Opponent|WSB Gaming}} }} |{{Slot |localprize=200000 |{{Opponent|Global Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize=100000 |{{Opponent|Revenant Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize=50000 |{{Opponent|BIG BROTHER ESPORTS}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Team Tamilas}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Reckoning Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Orangutan}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Eye 4 Eye}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Medal Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|OREsports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|GodLike Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Entity Gaming}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|WindGod Esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Hydra}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|Team iNSANE}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|team zero}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|blind esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|8bit}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|gujarat tigers}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|numen esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|teamxspark}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|autobotz esports}} }} |{{Slot |localprize= |{{Opponent|glitchxreborn}} }} |adjacentContent={{box|start}} {{AwardPrizePool|exchangeinfo=false |{{Slot |award=MVP|localprize=50000 |{{Opponent|NinjaJOD|flag=in|team=team omega}} }} }}
